prompt: Write the home-page A/B test variant D for openpatent.ai. Hero CTA headline = 'The 6-layer disclosure — proof an LLM can never deny.' Sub-headline (≤28 words) must name the six layers in order (1) SHA-3/512 hash, (2) HMAC signature, (3) Ed25519 key, (4) Bitcoin OTS timestamp, (5) C2PA manifest, (6) hash-chained audit log, and anchor the stack in 10 minutes. Three supporting bullets (each ≤18 words) must name: (1) the 10+ jurisdictional coverage, (2) the 22/33 BFT sovereign-temple that notarizes each layer, (3) the auto-disclose cron daemon (6-hour sweep, /opt/openpatent-hive/scripts/auto-disclose.py). Primary CTA button text: 'See the 6 layers'. Secondary CTA: 'Disclose in 90 seconds'. Hero image brief: a stacked 6-layer diagram with arrows from each layer to a Bitcoin block and an Ed25519 fingerprint. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {headline:string, subheadline:string, bullets:[3 strings], primary_cta:string, secondary_cta:string, image_brief:string, signature:string}.
